mapPlanner.metaDescription: Draw on Summoner's Rift, place objective icons, and share your plan with a link.
mapPlanner.title: Map planner

home.subtitle: The go-to platform to create, optimize and share your League of Legends builds.
home.heroTitle: Create, optimize, analyze, progress and share your builds
home.heroSubtitle: Community builds, tier lists, statistics, companion app and Lelariva content — everything to level up your game.
home.heroImageAlt: Lelanation — League of Legends build platform
home.popularBuildsSubtitle: Most viewed builds from the community.
home.recentBuildsSubtitle: The newest public builds from the community.
home.noBuildsYet: No public builds yet. Be the first to create one!
home.latestVideoSubtitle: Guides, builds and meta analysis on YouTube.
home.latestVideosSubtitle: The newest guides and meta breakdowns on YouTube.
home.appSubtitle: Import builds, manage favorites and all Lelanation features on your desktop.
home.contactSubtitle: Suggestion, bug or question — we'll read your message.
home.customizeTitle: A site that adapts to you
home.customizeSubtitle: Customize the layout, statistics and interface to your needs — keyboard shortcuts and settings in one click.
home.customizeCommandsHint: Toggle an option or use the shortcut — settings stay in sync with the bar below the navigation.
home.customizeShortcutOpenModal: Opens the full commands and shortcuts panel.
home.customizeShortcutShowBar: Shows the command bar below the navigation.
home.customizeShortcutHideBar: Hides the command bar to save space.
home.customizeShortcutsHint: Available across the site. Use the ? button in the command bar or Alt + H.
home.customizeToolbarTooltips: Disables hover tooltips for a cleaner reading experience.
home.customizeToolbarStreamer: Hides navigation and tooltips — ideal for streaming or screenshots.
home.customizeToolbarZoom: Scales up the interface for presentations and videos.
home.customizeToolbarSplash: Shows champion splash art in the background on stats pages.
home.customizeToolbarSimplified: Reduces columns and filters on statistics tables.
home.customizeToolbarSplitTransform: Splits stats for alternate forms (Kayn, Kha'Zix evolution, etc.).
home.customizeStatsText: Show or hide tabs, pick your default tab and keep only what you use.
home.customizeFeatureCommandBar: Command bar: tooltips, streamer mode, zoom, champion splash…
home.ctaTitle: Ready to create your first build?
home.ctaText: Join the Lelanation community and share your best setups

seo.homeTitle: Lelanation - League of Legends builds platform
seo.homeDescription: League of Legends builds and guides by the Lelariva community. Create, optimize and share your builds. Statistics, theorycraft, videos.
seo.defaultDescription: League of Legends builds and guides by the Lelariva community. Create, optimize and share your builds.

cookies.title: Cookies & storage preferences
cookies.text: We use local storage for your builds and preferences. We also use Matomo (audience measurement). You can accept or reject non-essential cookies.

validation.junglePetRequiresJungle: Jungle companions require the Jungle role.
validation.smiteRequiresJungle: Smite is only available with the Jungle role.
validation.tier3BootsRequiresMid: Tier 3 boots can only be selected with the Mid role.
validation.atlasRequiresSupport: World Atlas and its upgrades require the Support role.
validation.atlasUpgradeSingle: You can only have one World Atlas upgrade.
validation.atlasUpgradeNeedsStarter: Add World Atlas to your starting items to pick an upgrade.
validation.atlasUpgradeRequiredSave: Select a World Atlas upgrade to save this support build.

panel.emptyHint: Click an area on the build card (champion, items, runes) to open the related selector. Skill order is edited directly on the card.

spells.selectChampion: Select a champion to display spells.
spells.noSpells: No spell descriptions available for this champion.
spells.toggleActive: Include this spell's temporary buff in stat calculations

stats.title: Total stats
stats.empty: Select a champion and complete the build to see stats.

runes.noStackableRunes: No stackable runes in this build.

buildCard.itemsClickToToggle: Click an item to enable or disable it in stats calculations.
buildCard.itemsPassiveToggleHint: Use « Active » under an item to include its passive (Jak'Sho, Spellblade…) in stats and proc damage.
buildCard.itemsActiveLimitReached: Maximum 6 active items (boots included, except ADC: 6 items + boots).
buildCard.atlasUpgradeRequired: Support build: add a World Atlas upgrade to the build items.
buildCard.itemsStatsNote: Stats from enabled items (starters included when enabled; not counted toward the 6-item limit; one pair of boots).

statisticsPage.title: LoL Statistics
statisticsPage.metaTitle: LoL Statistics - Winrate and pickrate by champion | Lelanation
statisticsPage.metaDescription: League of Legends statistics: winrate and pickrate by champion, popular builds and runes. Ranked Solo/Duo EUW and EUNE. Filter by rank and role.
statisticsPage.tierListMetaDescription: League of Legends tier list for season {season} (patch {patch}): champion rankings by role, winrate and pickrate. Ranked Solo/Duo EUW and EUNE data.
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneDeltaGlobalTooltip: Duo win rate gap (percentage points) vs the global mean of all botlane duos (same patch / rank).
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneRankingNoData: Not enough botlane duo games for this ranking (filters / version).
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneRankingLoadError: Could not load botlane duo ranking.
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneDeltaTooltip: Win rate gap (percentage points) vs the average of other allied duos into the same enemy botlane (same patch / rank).
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneNoData: No botlane duo-vs-duo data for this version and filters.
statisticsPage.vsBotlaneLoadError: Could not load botlane duo-vs-duo stats.
statisticsPage.objectivesCombinedEmpty: No objective data for this cohort.
statisticsPage.patchNotesNoDataInRange: No patch notes data in the selected version range.
statisticsPage.recapDescription: Largest winrate moves (daily snapshots) and personal rules on win / pick / ban deltas.
statisticsPage.recapMetaDescription: Top winrate changes and a personal watchlist on Lelanation daily stats.
statisticsPage.recapEmptyGlobal: Not enough data to show movers yet.
statisticsPage.recapNoRules: No rules yet — add one below or use "Example".
statisticsPage.recapPickChampion: Pick a champion from the list.
statisticsPage.settingsDescription: Show or hide tabs on the Statistics page. Your preferences are saved on this device.
statisticsPage.settingsDefaultTabHint: Choose which tab opens when you visit Statistics.
statisticsPage.settingsWatchlistDescription: Select one or more champions to watch. Click a portrait to add or remove it.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsDescription: Set min, max, and patch-delta thresholds per cohort for watched champions. An alert triggers when a stat crosses a bound. Checks run on save, then at most once every 24 hours when you return.
statisticsPage.settingsBuildAlertsDescription: Global thresholds (items only) for all watched champions: winrate, pickrate, min games, and deltas since the last check. Detects new builds and shifts (gaining or losing interest).
statisticsPage.settingsBuildAlertsHint: Up to {count} item builds per champion (min. {minItems} items, any order).
statisticsPage.settingsBuildAlertsCheckDone: Build check: {count} build(s) analyzed, no alerts.
statisticsPage.settingsBuildAlertsCheckNoBuilds: No item builds found for watched champions.
statisticsPage.surveillanceSummaryEmpty: No archived alerts. Acknowledged alerts are hidden from champion cards and listed here.
statisticsPage.surveillanceAlertFilterHint: Multiple filters in a section = OR. Champion + builds = both must match.
statisticsPage.surveillanceAlertFilterNoResults: No champions match the alert filters.
statisticsPage.surveillanceAlertFilterNoBuilds: No builds match the alert filters.
statisticsPage.surveillanceBuildsEmpty: No item builds for these filters.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsVerifyHint: Saves thresholds and reference, then runs a check on all watched champions and configured cohorts.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsCohortLimit: At most {max} custom cohorts (in addition to All ranks).
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsAddCohortHint: Select one or more divisions, then add the cohort. Use the Global tab for all ranks.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsEditCohortHint: Edit the name and divisions of the selected cohort.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsThresholdModeSharedHint: The same thresholds apply to every cohort.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsThresholdModeSeparateHint: Each cohort has its own thresholds.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsCohortNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to use the default label (divisions).
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsCohortNeedsDivision: A cohort must include at least one division (or use Global).
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsReferenceHint: Comparison baseline for the “Patch delta” column: current patch, specific date, or chosen patch.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsReferenceCurrentPatchHint: Compares to the first day of the current patch ({patch}).
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsSaveInvalidReference: Set a valid reference and at least one threshold before checking.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsSaveInvalidThresholds: Configure at least one threshold (champion or item builds) before checking.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestDescription: Simulate a past visit: save current stats as yesterday’s reference, then run a simulated login check. If stats have not moved, use “Force demo alerts”.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestNoWatchlist: Add champions to the watchlist first.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestNeedBaseline: Save a reference before simulating login.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestNoTrigger: No alerts: current stats do not cross any threshold.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestUnresolved: {count} watched champion(s) could not be resolved. Reload or re-add them.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestApiFailed: Could not load stats ({count} champion(s)). Check that the API / backend is running.
statisticsPage.settingsAlertsTestDemoDone: Demo: {count} champion(s) in alert. Open Watchlist for details.
statisticsPage.surveillanceEmpty: No watched champions yet. Add some from statistics settings.
statisticsPage.surveillanceResolveError: Could not load the selected champions. Please try again in a moment.
statisticsPage.customEmpty: No favorite statistics yet. Add favorites from the classic page (star on the left of section titles).
statisticsPage.customModeBuildTooltip: Enable build mode to reorder, rename, and remove favorite cards.
statisticsPage.tierListNoPatch: Select a version (patch) in the filters to display the tier list.
statisticsPage.tierListNoData: No data for this patch. Make sure matches exist for the selected version.
statisticsPage.championTableTooltipDealt: Average damage to champions per game (both sides combined).
statisticsPage.championTableTooltipTaken: Average damage taken per game (both sides combined).
statisticsPage.championTableTooltipKda: Average K / D / A per game (both sides combined).
statisticsPage.championTableTooltipChampion: Champion name. Click to sort alphabetically.
statisticsPage.championTableDeltaColumnsHint: The smaller line under winrate, pickrate, and banrate is the change vs the reference patch (percentage points).
statisticsPage.tierListPatchDeltaSortTooltip: Sort by change vs reference patch (percentage points)
statisticsPage.tierListMobileChartHint: Bars = matchup score (0 at center), same colors as the desktop chart.
statisticsPage.tierListChartPbiAxis: Vertical axis: matchup score (weighted matchup sum), fixed scale −500 to +500, 0 at center. Order: lowest to highest.
statisticsPage.tierListChartPbiAxisTooltip: The vertical axis is the matchup score (weighted matchup sum), in ×100 points. The range fits the min/max of visible champions in steps of 100, always including 0; it clamps to ±500 when values hit that cap. Alternating yellow bands mark each 100-wide band to read the level. Champions are ordered from lowest score to highest.
statisticsPage.tierListTierTooltip: Target merit model: champion-vs-champion stats by ladder / ELO — for each matchup, delta = win rate in the matchup minus the average win rate of other champions in that matchup; the score blends those deltas weighted by matchup share..
statisticsPage.tierListMainRoleTooltip: Share of games played on this role (games on role / total champion games × 100).
statisticsPage.tierListPickrateTooltip: Share of picks in the role (champion-role games / total role games).
statisticsPage.tierListBanrateTooltip: Share of matches where the champion is banned (bans / total matches).
statisticsPage.tierListPbiTooltip: Pick Ban Influence: (winrate − bracket-average winrate) × 100 × pick% ÷ (100 − ban%). High PBI often means contested picks, strong meta presence, and valuable global bans.
statisticsPage.tierListHighEloWinTooltip: Win rate in Apex (Master + Grandmaster + Challenger).
statisticsPage.tierListDeltaTooltip: Difference between all-ranks win rate and Apex win rate (Master + Grandmaster + Challenger) (positive = better in high elo).
statisticsPage.tierListPatchDeltaHint: Δ line under stats: difference vs patch {ref} (progressions « reference version » filter). Displayed patch: {current}.
statisticsPage.tierListPatchDeltaTitle: Difference in percentage points vs patch {ref}
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastMostPick: Pickrate = (games with this item in this slot category) / (cohort participants) × 100. Top 5 by pickrate; a games threshold scales with sample size.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastLeastPick: Same pickrate basis; least represented items, with a relaxed games threshold so five rows can be shown.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastBestWr: Winrate = (wins / games) × 100. Top 5 by winrate in this category, with a minimum games threshold.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastWorstWr: Same winrate formula; items among the lowest WR (still a minimum games threshold).
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastDeltaPickUp: Pickrate increase vs reference patch ({version}); only meaningful positive gaps.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastDeltaPickDown: Pickrate decrease vs {version}; only meaningful negative gaps.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastDeltaWrUp: Winrate increase vs {version}; only meaningful positive gaps.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemFastDeltaWrDown: Winrate decrease vs {version}; only meaningful negative gaps.
statisticsPage.itemsDeltaNeedRefVersion: Pick a reference version (filter or progression) to compare deltas.
statisticsPage.tooltipItemsLowestWinrateLowPick: Enough games: lowest winrate among relatively low pick rate (bottom half); otherwise lowest winrates overall.
statisticsPage.summonerSpellsSlotDTooltip: Share of this spell’s appearances in the D slot (slot 0).
statisticsPage.summonerSpellsSlotFTooltip: Share of this spell’s appearances in the F slot (slot 1).
statisticsPage.abandonsDescription: Remake and surrender (before 15 minutes / normal) rates.
statisticsPage.progressionsDescription: Comparison since version {version}: winrate and popularity (pickrate) evolution across all versions since.
statisticsPage.progressionsNoVersion: No version available. Progressions require per-version data (see Overview).
statisticsPage.overviewDurationWinrateDescription: Number of matches per duration bucket (smoothed data). X-axis: game duration (min). Y-axis: number of matches.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipRole: Champion main role for the active filters.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipAverage: Average = Iron to Gold tiers. Status + values (WR/BR/PRESENCE) and threshold position.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipAverageDelta: Average status change vs previous patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipSkilled: Skilled = Platinum to Diamond tiers. Status + values and threshold position.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipSkilledDelta: Skilled status change vs previous patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipElite: Elite = Diamond to Challenger tiers. Status + values and threshold position (includes presence).
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipEliteDelta: Elite status change vs previous patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipGlobal: Global: Overpowered if at least one level is OP, Underpowered if all levels are UP, otherwise Balanced.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipGlobalDelta: Global status change vs previous patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipNoGames: No games for this champion in this bracket on the current patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipStatusUnchanged: Status unchanged versus the reference patch.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipGlobalStatusChange: Global status: {status}. Change versus reference patch: {delta}.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipRelationOp: Winrate {winrate}% (overpowered threshold {wrHigh}%), banrate {banrate}% ({ratio} x average banrate), underpowered below {wrLow}% winrate.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipRelationOpElite: Winrate {winrate}% (overpowered threshold {wrHigh}%), banrate {banrate}% ({ratio} x average banrate), presence {presence}%.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipRelationUp: Distance to underpowered threshold by winrate: {delta} points.
statisticsPage.balanceTooltipRelationUpElite: Distance to underpowered threshold by presence: {delta} points.
statisticsPage.balanceAbbrevAbr: Average Ban Rate (mean ban rate for the level)
statisticsPage.itemsTooltipType: When the item is bought: starter, core, boots, or final.
statisticsPage.itemsTooltipPickrate: Pickrate = (games with this item in this type) / (participants) × 100.
statisticsPage.itemsTooltipDeltaPick: Pickrate difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.itemsTooltipDeltaWin: Winrate difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipDeltaPick: Pickrate difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipDeltaWin: Winrate difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipPctD: Share of this spell appearances on key D.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipDeltaD: D-slot share difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipPctF: Share of this spell appearances on key F.
statisticsPage.spellsTooltipDeltaF: F-slot share difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.overviewDetailTimeout: Runes, items and spells could not be loaded (timeout or unavailable).
statisticsPage.overviewTeamsFirstByTeam: % of matches where team got first
statisticsPage.overviewTeamsNoData: No team data (bans/objectives) for this filter.
statisticsPage.sidesDescription: Blue side and red side. Data is filtered by version and division.
statisticsPage.sidesWinrateShareNote: Per side: wins ÷ games played with that team id (100 blue, 200 red).
statisticsPage.sidesObjectivesIntro: Objectives: first to take or kill distribution; blue (100) and red (200) columns.
statisticsPage.tooltipOverviewTotalMatches: Total number of matches in the database for the selected filter.
statisticsPage.tooltipOverviewLastUpdate: Date of the last match collected.
statisticsPage.tooltipOverviewPlayerCount: Number of distinct players (puuids) who participated in at least one match.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsMostPicked: Pickrate = (games played with this champion) / (total matches) × 100. Top 5 by pickrate, min. 20 games.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsBestWinrate: Winrate = (wins / games) × 100. Top 5 by winrate, min. 20 games.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsMostBanned: Each ban is counted: if both teams ban the same champion = 2 bans. Banrate = (champion ban count) / (2 × total matches) × 100 (100% = banned by both teams in every match).
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsWinrateSince: Progression: delta between winrate on the single version (e.g. 16.1) and winrate on all versions since (16.1 + 16.2 + …). +X% = champion performs better over all versions than on the initial version.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsPickrateSince: Same idea as winrate: pickrate delta between the single patch version and all versions since (including that patch).
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsBanrateSince: Same idea: banrate delta between the single patch version and all versions since.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsWinrateSinceDown: Champions whose winrate on the single patch is higher than on all versions since: they look relatively weaker on the combined “since” window. A negative % means the champion was stronger on the initial patch alone than on the aggregate of patches from that version onward.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsPickrateSinceDown: Same idea for pickrate: negative delta = more popular on the single patch than on all versions since combined.
statisticsPage.tooltipFastStatsBanrateSinceDown: Same idea for banrate: negative delta = banned more often on the single patch than on the aggregate since window.
statisticsPage.tooltipSidesBansBySide: For this side (blue or red): banrate = (matches where this champion was banned by this side) / (total matches) × 100. Each team has 5 bans per game. Top 5 by banrate.
statisticsPage.tooltipSidesMatchOutcomeCard: For this side only: mix of before 15 minutes surrenders, surrenders, and games played through, as a share of matches counted for this side.
statisticsPage.tooltipOverviewObjectives: For each objective: % of matches where the winning team got first, and % where the losing team got it. Sum may be < 100% (e.g. first blood not taken).
statisticsPage.tooltipSidesObjectives: By map side (blue = team 100, red = 200): for each objective, % of matches where that side secured first or the shown split (kills, etc.). This is not the same as the overview (winning vs losing team columns).
statisticsPage.tooltipTableBans: Champions banned in the cohort. Banrate = (total bans of that champion) / (2 × matches) × 100: each team has 5 bans; the same champion can be banned by both teams.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableBansSecondary: Optional columns: % when the banning team won or lost, by role, blue / red side. Δ = difference in percentage points vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableChampion: Per champion: winrate and pickrate on blue and red, average damage dealt / taken and KDA for the cohort (damage columns combine both sides).
statisticsPage.tooltipTableRunes: Grid: pickrate and winrate per rune (leaf) and per shard slot. Below: paginated most-played full builds.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableRunesSecondary: Set WR / pR = wins and games with that exact build. ΔP / ΔWR = gap vs reference patch when comparison is enabled.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableSpells: Spells (or D+F pairs): pickrate, winrate, average casts. Solo mode: share of appearances on D and F.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableSpellsSecondary: Δ pick / WR / casts = gap vs reference patch. Pair mode: one row per spell combination.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableItems: Items by type (starter, core, boots, final): pickrate and winrate on games where the item appears in that category.
statisticsPage.tooltipTableItemsSecondary: Legendary filter: completed finals and tier 2/3 boots. Δ = percentage-point gap vs reference patch.
statisticsPage.searchPlayerHint: Enter a summoner name and search to view their statistics.
statisticsPage.gameDataItemsHint: Item data not loaded: names/icons will show after game data is loaded.
statisticsPage.gameDataRunesHint: Runes data not loaded: names will show after game data is loaded.
statisticsPage.championStatsTrendFromDateHint: Filters trend charts (games, WR, pick, ban) from this date onward. Takes priority over the reference version window.
statisticsPage.itemStatsPurchaseTimingHint: Average time of first item purchase in a match (mm:ss from game start).
statisticsPage.itemStatsBreakdownEmpty: Not enough data for these filters.
statisticsPage.itemStatsWinrateByOrderHint: Position among starter and completed legendary purchases (1 = first eligible purchase in the match).
statisticsPage.itemStatsPurchaseOrderEmpty: Not enough purchase-order data for these filters.
statisticsPage.itemStatsPurchaseTimingDailyHint: Average purchase time (mm:ss from game start), day by day.
statisticsPage.championStatsMetaDescription: {champion} stats season {season} patch {patch}: win rate, pick rate, builds, matchups and runes on Lelanation.
statisticsPage.championStatsMetaDescriptionFallback: League of Legends champion statistics: win rate, matchups, builds and runes.
statisticsPage.championStatsMetaDescriptionWithStats: {champion} patch {patch}: {winrate}% win rate, {pickrate}% pick rate. Builds, matchups and runes on Lelanation.
statisticsPage.championStatsSeoIntro: {champion}: {winrate}% win rate and {pickrate}% pick rate on patch {patch} in Ranked Solo/Duo.
statisticsPage.championStatsSummonerSpellsHint: Per-spell and spell-pair stats for this champion (version and division).
statisticsPage.championStatsDurationWinrateHint: Global curve (all champions) with same rank filter.
statisticsPage.championStatsDurationWinrateChampionHint: Curve for this champion only (same rank filter).
statisticsPage.championMiscEmpty: Not enough games for these stats.
statisticsPage.championStatsLegendToggleDivision: Click to hide/show this division on charts
statisticsPage.championSynergyProfileWarningsHint: Signals where the duo underperforms vs other allies (lower CS, vision, early pressure, etc.). Worth checking before locking the comp.
statisticsPage.championSynergyTooltipLaneProfile: Duo strengths and watchouts compared to other pairings with the same ally.
statisticsPage.championMatchupDetailUnavailable: Lane detail unavailable for this matchup (insufficient data).
statisticsPage.championMatchupDetailProfileHint: Comparison vs lane opponent on this matchup (relative to other champions in the same role).
statisticsPage.championMatchupDetailProfileBalanced: Balanced matchup: no clear lane signal stands out in this duel.

early.title: Strong very early lane
early.detail: Gold diff {gold5} at 5 min vs lane opponent.

laneEconomy.title: Better lane economy
laneEconomy.detail: Gold diff {gold15} at 15 min — gold converted into tempo.

kills.title: More kill pressure in lane
kills.detail: {kills} kills vs opponent / game before 15 min ({deaths} deaths).

level.title: Level / XP advantage
level.detail: {level} level and {xp} XP diff at 15 min.

cs.title: Better lane farm
cs.detail: CS diff {cs15} at 15 min vs opponent.

vision.title: Better vision control
vision.detail: Places more wards (vision diff {vision15} at 15 min).

objectives.title: More objective presence
objectives.detail: ~{objectives} drake/herald/void involvements per game (assists, steals and objective fight kills included).

gank.title: Better gank trade
gank.detail: {kills} gank kills / game for {deaths} gank deaths.

dive.title: Effective tower dives
dive.detail: {kills} dive kills / game for {deaths} dive deaths.

diveKills.title: Effective tower dives
diveKills.detail: {kills} dive kills / game for {deaths} dive deaths.

legendaryFirst.title: Buys legendary item first
legendaryFirst.detail: First legendary before opponent in {you} of games (opp. {opp}).

visionHigh.title: Places more wards / control wards
visionHigh.detail: Vision score +{vision15} at 15 min vs lane opponent.

early.title: Weak very early lane
early.detail: Gold diff {gold5} at 5 min — rough lane start.

laneEconomy.title: Behind in lane economy
laneEconomy.detail: Gold diff {gold15} at 15 min — gold not converted well.

kills.title: Suffers kill pressure
kills.detail: {deaths} deaths vs opponent / game before 15 min ({kills} kills).

level.title: Behind in level / XP
level.detail: {level} level and {xp} XP diff at 15 min.

cs.title: Behind in lane farm
cs.detail: CS diff {cs15} at 15 min vs opponent.

objectives.title: Less objective presence
objectives.detail: Lower objective participation, steals and presence around drakes / herald / grubs than lane opponent.

gank.title: Suffers ganks
gank.detail: {deaths} gank deaths / game for {kills} gank kills.

dive.title: Often dies while diving
dive.detail: {deaths} dive deaths / game for {kills} dive kills.

roam.title: Costly roams
roam.detail: {deaths} roam deaths / game for {kills} roam kills.

diveDeaths.title: Often dies while diving
diveDeaths.detail: {deaths} dive deaths / game for only {kills} dive kills.

legendaryLate.title: Opponent finishes 1st legendary first
legendaryLate.detail: 1st legendary in {you} of games vs {opp} (~{delay}s slower on average).

goldHoard.title: Holds gold too long
goldHoard.detail: 1st item ~{delay}s later despite similar lane gold ({gold15} at 15 min).

visionLow.title: Places fewer control wards / wards
visionLow.detail: Vision score {vision15} at 15 min — less vision than opponent.

platesLost.title: Loses more tower plates
platesLost.detail: {you} plates taken / game vs {opp} for opponent.

statisticsPage.championMatchupTooltipScore: Weighted matchup score (winrate delta vs peer picks on the same matchup, adjusted by sample size).
statisticsPage.championMatchupDelta1Formula: Delta 1 = Counter matchup win rate - (100 - counter champion overall average win rate). Positive means the champion wins this matchup more than the average champion does versus that opponent.
statisticsPage.championMatchupDelta2Formula: Delta 2 = Counter matchup win rate - normalized champion win rate in matchup. Positive means the champion wins this matchup more often than normalized winrates would suggest.
statisticsPage.championMatchupTooltipWinrate: Raw winrate for this champion on this matchup (in the displayed role).
statisticsPage.championMatchupTooltipPickrate: Share of this matchup among all champion matchups in the current filters.
statisticsPage.championMatchupTooltipLaneScore: Average lane-signal score (CS, level, kill pressure, vision, lane economy, early lane), normalized vs peers then multiplied by 100.
statisticsPage.championMatchupTooltipLaneProfile: Lane strengths and warning signals on this matchup compared to peer picks.
statisticsPage.championMatchupLaneProfileLegendHint: Each chip is one lane signal. Short label + intensity (+/−). Hover a chip for details.
statisticsPage.championMatchupDominanceBalanced: No clear lane edge vs peers on this matchup

championMatchupDominanceDetail.early: Gold diff at 5 min vs lane opponent (timeline).
championMatchupDominanceDetail.laneEconomy: Gold diff at 15 min vs lane opponent (timeline).
championMatchupDominanceDetail.kills: Kills vs lane opponent before 15 min (minus deaths taken).
championMatchupDominanceDetail.level: Level diff at 15 min vs lane opponent.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.cs: CS diff at 15 min vs lane opponent.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.vision: Vision score diff at 15 min vs lane opponent.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.items: First legendary item / purchase timing vs lane opponent.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.gank: Gank kills minus deaths to ganks (jungler or off-lane ally) before 15 min.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.dive: Dive kills under enemy tower minus dive deaths before 15 min.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.roam: Roam kills or assists off your lane minus roam deaths before 15 min.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.objectives: Drake / herald / void grub participation, objective fight kills and steals, minus deaths on objective — vs lane opponent.
championMatchupDominanceDetail.pressure: First tower and plates taken, minus opponent's.

statisticsPage.championObjectivesSoloBaronPctHint: Games with baron kill credit and no assist.
statisticsPage.championObjectivesSoloEpicPctHint: Solo kill credit on baron, dragon, herald, grubs, or elder.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.selectChampionPrompt: Select a champion to see statistics
stats.selectChampionAndItems: Select a champion and items to see statistics
stats.disclaimer: Calculations are based on official data and wiki formulas, but may contain errors

formulas.attackSpeed: Final AS = base AS × (1 + total bonus attack speed / 100).
formulas.movementSpeed: Final MS = (base MS + flat from items) × (1 + (item % + shard %) / 100). Items column: gain using only item flat + item %; Shards: shard % gain on (base + item flat).
formulas.abilityHaste: Total ability haste = item haste + shard haste.
formulas.totalEffectiveHealth: Total effective health = average of [HP × (1 + Armor/100)] and [HP × (1 + MR/100)].

skills.firstThreeUpsDescription: Order in which the first 3 skills are learned
skills.skillUpOrderDescription: Order in which skills are maxed first

information.title: How it works
information.metaTitle: How it works — stats, scores & builds | Lelanation
information.metaDescription: LoL stat formulas (winrate, pickrate, tier score, matchups), public/private build rules and the “out of date” badge on Lelanation.
information.intro: This page explains how Lelanation statistics are calculated, what scores and alerts mean, and build rules (public, private, out of date). Numbers come from ranked solo/duo games ingested via the Riot API, filtered by patch and rank when you change filters.

filters.title: Filters (patch, rank, role)
filters.p1: Most stats respect your active filters: patch version (e.g. 16.12), rank (e.g. Gold only, or all tiers), and sometimes role (top, jungle, mid…). Ahri mid Gold on patch 16.12 is not the same as a global all-ranks winrate.
filters.p2: The last update shown on the overview is the newest match in the current filter. If the poller lags or you filter a low-volume patch, percentages become less reliable.

ranks.title: Ranks (solo/duo)
ranks.intro: Stats come from ranked solo/duo games. On the site, the division filter uses the league tier (Iron → Challenger), not individual divisions I / II / III / IV.

individual.title: Per-player rank
individual.definition: For each participant, we keep the Solo/Duo tier closest to the match date (rank history).
individual.example: Example: a player at Gold II when the game was played is aggregated as Gold.

fallback.title: Match average rank (fallback)
fallback.definition: If a player's solo rank is unknown, they inherit the match average rank of ranked players in that game.
fallback.formula: match_rank = rounded tier( average of ranked players' league ordinals )
fallback.example: Example: 3 Gold and 2 Plat in the match → average rank ≈ Gold for players without an individual rank.

filter.title: Division filter on the site
filter.p1: No filter: all leagues. When you pick one or more divisions, only games where the participant's effective rank matches the selection are counted.
filter.li1: Available leagues: Iron, Bronze, Silver, Gold, Plat, Emerald, Diamond, Master, Grandmaster, Challenger.
filter.li2: You can combine several leagues (e.g. Gold + Plat = a wider cohort).
filter.li3: Matches with no identifiable ranked player are not aggregated into per-league stats.

metrics.title: Champion statistics
metrics.intro: Each metric uses a consistent notion of a “game”: one participant row (one champion in one match). Bans are counted at match level.

winrate.title: Winrate
winrate.definition: Share of games won with this champion (within the active filter).
winrate.example: Example: Ahri has 72 wins in 120 games → winrate = 72 / 120 × 100 = 60.0%

pickrate.title: Pickrate
pickrate.definition: Share of filtered matches where the champion is picked (at most once per match).
pickrate.formula: pickrate = matches with champion / total matches × 100
pickrate.example: Example: Zed picked in 800 of 10,000 filtered matches → pickrate = 8.0%

banrate.title: Banrate
banrate.definition: Share of matches where the champion is banned (at least once in the match).
banrate.formula: banrate = matches with ban / total matches × 100
banrate.example: Example: Yasuo banned in 1,200 of 10,000 matches → banrate = 12.0%

presence.title: Presence
presence.definition: Share of matches where the champion is picked or banned.
presence.formula: presence = (pick matches + ban matches) / total matches × 100
presence.example: Example: 800 picks + 400 bans in 10,000 matches → presence = 12.0%

tierList.title: Tier list — score & PBI
tierList.intro: The tier list ranks champions by role on the selected patch. Tier letters (S, A, B…) derive from a numeric score; PBI is a complementary “meta strength” indicator.

tierScore.title: Tier score
tierScore.definition: Distance from a neutral 50% winrate, weighted by game volume on the role.

pbi.title: PBI (Performance Beyond Impact)
pbi.definition: Combines winrate distance from 50%, pickrate and banrate. Heavily banned champions have a smaller denominator (less often available).

matchups.title: Matchups (lane)
matchups.intro: Matchups compare a champion to their direct lane opponent (e.g. Ahri mid vs Sylas mid). Extended tables use a delta vs other lane champions.

delta.title: Delta
delta.definition: Gap between your matchup winrate and the average winrate of other eligible champions vs the same opponent.
delta.formula: Delta(A vs B) = winrate(A vs B) − avg(winrate(C vs B))
delta.example: Example: Ahri vs Sylas 54%, other mids vs Sylas avg 48% → Delta = +6 points

score.title: Matchup score
score.definition: Delta is mapped to a −10…+10 score, then weighted by how often the matchup appears in your lane game pool.
score.formula: weighted score = base_score(delta) × games(A vs B) / games(A on lane)
score.example: Example: Delta +3 → base +3; if the matchup is 15% of your mid games, it contributes proportionally to the champion's overall note.

laneProfile.title: Lane profile
laneProfile.intro: The Lane profile chips in the matchups table summarize how you perform in lane vs a specific opponent, compared to other champions in the same role facing that opponent.
laneProfile.method: For each signal, we compute a per-game average (gold, CS, lane kills, etc.), then a z-score vs the peer cohort (minimum 3 games per champion). Strengths and watchouts appear when the z-score crosses a threshold.

laneScore.title: Lane score
laneScore.definition: Synthetic note: average of z-scores across all 12 signals, scaled × 100.
laneScore.example: Example: average z +0.8 across signals → lane score ≈ +80 (favorable lane vs cohort on this matchup).

intensity.title: Chip intensity
intensity.definition: Each signal is converted to a z-score vs other champions in the same role vs the same opponent, then mapped to a visual level.
intensity.example: The higher abs(z), the stronger the signal is shown as a strength or watchout.

laneProfile.signalsIntro: Each chip is one axis measured before 15 min (timeline when available, otherwise Riot fallback metrics). Gank, dive and roam are detected from the kill timeline; objectives also include deaths on objective, steals and kills around drakes / herald / grubs.
laneProfile.eventDetectionIntro: These events are counted only before 15 min from the match timeline (when available).

eventDetection.gank: Gank — kill you are part of with jungler (or ally) help on a non-jungle lane, not classified as a dive.
eventDetection.dive: Dive — kill you are part of under a standing enemy tower (tower aggro radius).
eventDetection.roam: Roam — kill or assist on another lane than yours (not jungle), without gank/dive classification, before 20 min.
eventDetection.objectives: Objectives — kills and assists on drake, herald and void grubs; kills around objectives; deaths on objective; epic steals (Riot challenges). The signal compares your tally to your lane opponent's.

surveillance.title: Surveillance alerts (watchlist)
surveillance.p1: The Surveillance page compares current champion metrics (winrate, pickrate, banrate) to thresholds you set, per rank cohort (e.g. Gold + Plat, or global all ranks).
surveillance.p2: An alert fires when a value leaves the min/max range, or when the change (delta) vs a reference exceeds your threshold (up or down).
surveillance.li1: Min/max threshold — e.g. alert if winrate < 48% or pickrate > 12%.
surveillance.li2: Delta — e.g. alert if winrate drops more than 2 points vs yesterday or the reference period.
surveillance.li3: Alerts are indicative: low game volume on a cohort makes swings noisy.

visibility.title: Public & private builds
visibility.p1: When creating or editing a build, you choose visibility:
visibility.public: Public — stored on the server, visible in Discover, shareable URL, listed in community feeds.
visibility.private: Private — the build is stored only in your browser's localStorage; it is never sent to the server and does not appear in Discover or public lists.
visibility.votes: Automatic removal — once a public build or matchup guide has at least 10 votes (👍 + 👎), if it falls below 30% upvotes, it becomes private again: the server copy is deleted and it disappears from Discover (it stays in your localStorage if you had saved it locally).
visibility.p2: If your build or guide is “no longer public”, check visibility in the editor or whether the vote threshold was hit. To republish: set Public and save. Private content stays on your device only — clearing site data or switching browsers will remove it.

patchStale.title: “Out of date” badge
patchStale.p1: After patch notes are published, Lelanation compares your builds to champions, items or runes changed in that patch (from scraped patch notes).
patchStale.li1: If your build uses an entity touched by the patch and its game version is older than that patch, an Out of date badge appears.
patchStale.li2: Flagged builds can be hidden with the “Up to date” filter on Discover.
patchStale.li3: The badge clears when you update and save the build — saving removes the server flag.
patchStale.p2: This is a reminder that balance may have shifted — review runes, items and skill order.
patchStale.note: The badge does not clear on its own: once flagged for a patch, it stays until you review the build, even if you dismiss the banner.

championRegions.title: Region colors (card borders)
championRegions.p1: Colored borders on build and matchup guide cards reflect each champion's origin region in Runeterra. The reference source is the official League of Legends Universe site (faction shown on each champion page).
championRegions.li1: Each champion is mapped to a region (Demacia, Noxus, Ionia, etc.) or to Runeterra when Riot lists them as unaffiliated on Universe.
championRegions.li2: Lelanation checks this list on every Data Dragon version cron run: new champions and explicit faction changes are applied to regions.json.
championRegions.li3: If Universe marks a champion unaffiliated but we keep a more specific region (known lore origin), a Discord alert flags the mismatch for manual review.
championRegions.p2: Region color palettes are defined on our side; only the champion → region mapping is synced with Riot.

data.title: Data sources & limits
data.p1: Aggregated stats come from our ingestion pipeline (ranked games, resolved ranks, DB aggregates). User builds are separate from these stats.
data.p2: Lelanation is not affiliated with Riot Games. Numbers reflect our collected sample, not the entire Riot player base.

shortcuts.intro: These shortcuts work across the site. You can also open the full panel with the ? button in the command bar below the navigation, or with Alt + H.
shortcuts.statsTabsDesc: On the global Statistics page: move to the previous or next tab.
shortcuts.championTabsDesc: On a champion stats page: switch tabs (overview, matchups, runes…).
shortcuts.itemTabsDesc: On an item stats page: switch between overview and purchases.
shortcuts.editableNote: Global shortcuts are ignored when focus is in a text field, dropdown or editable area.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.metaDescription: Lelanation legal notice - Information on the use of Riot Games data and Lelariva content

siteInfo.title: About this site
siteInfo.intro: The Lelanation website is a community platform dedicated to League of Legends builds. This site is run on a personal basis and is not affiliated with, associated with, authorized by, endorsed by, or sponsored by Riot Games, Inc. or its affiliates.

riotData.title: Riot Games data
riotData.disclaimer: Lelanation isn't endorsed by Riot Games and doesn't reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Riot Games properties. Riot Games, and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.
riotData.p1: This site uses game data (champions, items, runes, summoner spells, etc.) from the Data Dragon API of Riot Games, Inc.
riotData.p2: Lelanation is not an official partner of Riot Games and has no official right, license or authorization from Riot Games to use this data. Use of this data is in accordance with Riot Games' data use policy for non-commercial community projects.
riotData.p3: League of Legends is a registered trademark of Riot Games, Inc. All rights reserved to Riot Games, Inc.
riotData.p4: For more information on Riot Games' data use policy, please visit:

lelariva.title: Lelariva content
lelariva.p1: This site may reference the YouTube content creator Lelariva and may use some of their videos or content as part of the build discovery feature.
lelariva.p2: Lelanation is not an official partner of Lelariva and has no official right, license or authorization from Lelariva to use their content. Use of this content is for fair use and promotion of community content.
lelariva.p3: All rights to Lelariva's content remain with Lelariva. If you are Lelariva and wish to have your content removed from this site, please contact us.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.p1: All content created by Lelanation users (builds, descriptions, etc.) remains the property of their respective authors. By publishing content on Lelanation, you grant the site the right to display and share it within the platform.
ip.p2: The design, structure and source code of Lelanation are protected by intellectual property laws.

liability.title: Liability
liability.p1: Lelanation is a community site. Builds and content shared by users are provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, relevance or effectiveness of shared builds.
liability.p2: Lelanation cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damage resulting from the use or inability to use the site or its content.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any questions regarding this legal notice or to report content, you can contact us via social networks or the contact form.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: Lelanation privacy policy - Information on cookies, data collected and your rights

dataCollected.title: Data collected
dataCollected.p1: Lelanation uses browser local storage (localStorage) to save your builds and certain preferences (e.g. votes, cookie consent, active tab). No account is required and no personal data is collected.
dataCollected.p2: All data is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to external servers, except when you choose to share a build publicly.

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.p1: Lelanation does not use traditional HTTP cookies. Instead, we use browser localStorage to store:
essential.p2: This data is necessary for the site to function and does not require explicit consent under the GDPR, as it is strictly necessary for the provision of the requested service.

nonEssential.title: Non-essential cookies
nonEssential.p1: Lelanation uses Matomo for audience measurement (page views, navigation). Matomo is an open-source analytics tool that helps us understand how the site is used (no advertising or data resale).
nonEssential.p2: Matomo tracking is only enabled after your explicit consent via the cookie banner. You can refuse; the site then works without audience analytics.

manage.title: Managing your preferences
manage.p1: You can at any time modify or delete data stored in your browser by:
manage.li1: Deleting the site data in your browser settings
manage.li3: Disabling JavaScript (this will prevent the site from functioning)

shareBuilds.title: Sharing builds
shareBuilds.p1: When you choose to make a build public, it is stored on our servers and can be viewed by all site users. Public builds only include the information you have chosen to share (name, description, author, build configuration).
shareBuilds.p2: You can at any time delete a public build from the "My Builds" page or by making it private.

thirdParty.title: Data from third parties
thirdParty.p1: Lelanation retrieves game data (champions, items, runes, etc.) from Riot Games' Data Dragon API. This data is cached locally to improve site performance.
thirdParty.p2: No personal data is shared with Riot Games or other third parties as part of this data retrieval.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.access: Right of access: You can view all your data stored locally
rights.rectification: Right to rectification: You can modify your builds and preferences at any time
rights.erasure: Right to erasure: You can delete your builds and data locally
rights.portability: Right to portability: Your data is already in your browser, you can export it
rights.p2: To exercise these rights, you can simply delete the site data in your browser settings or individually delete your builds from the interface.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy, you can contact us via social networks or the contact form.

analytics.title: Audience measurement (Matomo)
analytics.p1: Lelanation uses Matomo to analyse site usage (page views, duration, navigation). Matomo is hosted according to our configuration; data is not shared with ad networks.
analytics.p2: Tracking is only enabled after your consent (cookie banner). You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting the site data in your browser settings.

lelanationApp.metaDescription: Download the Lelanation companion app to import your builds into the LoL client and sync matches.
lelanationApp.title: Lelanation App
lelanationApp.subtitle: The Windows companion app connecting your LoL client experience with the Lelanation web project.
lelanationApp.downloadHint: The download link always points to the latest available version.
lelanationApp.downloadUnavailable: Installer is not available right now.
lelanationApp.downloadError: Download failed. Please try again later.
lelanationApp.smartScreenText: During installation, Windows may show an "Unknown publisher" warning. This is expected: our app is signed but we don't yet have a Microsoft-recognized certificate (EV certificate). The application contains nothing malicious and its source code is fully open-source.
lelanationApp.smartScreenSteps: To proceed with installation, click "More info" then "Run anyway".

features.importBuilds: Import builds into the LoL client (runes, items, summoner spells based on your settings).
features.localFavorites: Favorites are stored locally on your device (no server storage).
features.matchSync: Sends end-of-game info (matchId + region) to enrich website stats.
features.settings: Clear settings to control what gets imported.

lelanationApp.gdprIntro: Privacy is built-in from the MVP:

items.consent: Explicit consent before using sync features.
items.minData: Data minimization: only matchId and region are sent.
items.rights: Access/deletion rights through local data controls and privacy policy.

videosPage.noCreatorsText: Ask an admin to add channels.

patchNotes.title: Admin · Patch notes
patchNotes.subtitle: JSON patch notes viewer (admin only).
patchNotes.buildCheckerHint: Tests a sample build score against loaded patch JSON files.
patchNotes.runDemoCheck: Run demo check (Darius + TF + Lethal Tempo)
patchNotes.noAffected: No entities affected since build creation.

appDownload.title: Download companion app
appDownload.description: Windows app to import builds into the LoL client and submit matches to the site.

riotMatch.title: Riot data collection
riotMatch.pollerHint: Active = a collect succeeded in the last 10 minutes (worker or button below).
riotMatch.workerStartHint: The collect poller runs inside the backend (same process). Restart the backend to restart the poller.
riotMatch.backfillTitle: Fill missing participant ranks from Riot API then recompute Match.rank. Runs in background.
riotMatch.backfillBackground: Backfill ranks started in background. Refresh in a few minutes.
riotMatch.stopPollerSuccess: Stop request sent. The worker will exit at the end of the current cycle.
riotMatch.triggerBackground: Collect started in background. Refresh in 2–5 min to see updated status.
riotMatch.description: Manual run of the match collection cron (Ranked Solo/Duo EUW/EUNE). Runs a single collect in background.
riotMatch.leagueExpTitle: Calls /lol/league-exp/v4/entries/{queue}/{tier}/{division} and adds players for later polling.
riotMatch.leagueExpBackground: League-exp discovery started in background. Refresh in a few minutes.

scripts.label: Poller scripts
scripts.noLogs: No logs available for this script.

descriptions.worker: Continuous collection loop: fetches new matches, stores participants, and refreshes stats automatically.
descriptions.collectOnce: Runs a single immediate collection pass (no loop) to fetch matches quickly.
descriptions.backfillRanks: Fills missing participant ranks from Riot API, then recomputes Match.rank.
descriptions.backfillRoles: Fills missing participant roles (TOP/JUNGLE/MID/ADC/SUPPORT) from Riot match data.
descriptions.backfillUntilDone: Runs backfill (ranks + roles) in a loop until no null data remains. Single process with PID.
descriptions.refreshMatchRanks: Recomputes Match.rank for existing matches based on participant ranks.
descriptions.discoverPlayers: Discovers additional players from historical matches of known players, then stores them.
descriptions.discoverLeagueExp: Scans Riot league entries by queue/tier/division and adds those players for future polling.
descriptions.enrichPlayers: Enriches existing players by fetching/normalizing missing fields (e.g. summoner_name).

riotApikey.title: Riot API key
riotApikey.description: Key used for Riot API calls (developer.riotgames.com). Stored on the server and overrides the RIOT_API_KEY environment variable when set.

seedPlayers.title: Seed players
seedPlayers.description: Riot IDs used as starting point for match collection. The cron fetches their matches (current patch), then PUUIDs of other players to expand the crawl. Format: Name#Tag or Name-Tag (e.g. Urpog#URGOT). On op.gg the Riot ID is in the URL: /summoners/euw/Urpog-URGOT → enter Urpog-URGOT or Urpog#URGOT.
seedPlayers.labelPlaceholder: Riot ID (Name#Tag or Name-Tag, e.g. Urpog#URGOT)
seedPlayers.empty: No seed players. Add pseudos to start collection from them.
seedPlayers.alreadyInSeedList: This player is already in the seed list.
seedPlayers.playerAlreadyInDatabase: This player is already in the database (their matches are already collected).
seedPlayers.playerAlreadyInDatabaseName: This player ({name}) is already in the database (their matches are already collected).
seedPlayers.allPlayersDescription: Players whose matches are already collected. Adding a player already in the database is blocked.

replays.title: Match replay links
replays.description: Fetch recent matches from Riot for a summoner and generate replay links.

matchups.title: Matchup tier list
matchups.description: Lane-vs-lane score (-10 to +10) driven mostly by winrate, with KDA/level adjustments and patch delta.

adminApp.title: Lelanation App
adminApp.description: This Windows companion app connects the LoL client with the Lelanation project. It imports builds (runes, items, summoner spells based on your settings), keeps favorites locally, and sends matchId + region after each game.
adminApp.unavailable: Installer not available. Configure COMPANION_APP_INSTALLER_PATH or COMPANION_APP_DOWNLOAD_URL on backend.

features.importBuilds: Build import into LoL client through LCU.
features.localFavorites: Favorites and preferences are stored locally, not on server.
features.matchSync: Sends matchId + region to backend for stats ingestion.
features.settings: Import settings: runes, items, summoner spells.
